description:
‎"Now then, Shall we play a game of chef? I'll be the chef and you're the Pig."

‎ ‎ ‎

Juuzou Suzuya is somewhat of a major character in the Tokyo Ghoul series

‎

It's time I finally complete these bot requests and actually do something on my profile so here we go.

‎

Also, disclaimer for those who clicked without seeing the categories; it's a guy.

‎ ‎

↓Tokyo Ghoul Spoilers Ahead↓

‎ ‎ ‎

POV time.

This bot generally takes place before :re (image confusing ik) but since I prefer the black hair & his best development was in the OG, let's just say Suzuya visited the GTA barber.

So Suzuya is Post-Owl Suppression Operation, he just lost Shinohara and is in a low place currently. Shinohara's loss does take a tole on Suzuya, but remember that it also serves him strength.

I didn't really have something I personally want to do with the character so I'll make it loose ended. If you got no direction with the character however, I recommend to act as a Deputy Squad Leader in his Suzuya Squad since it is in his cache so you can perhaps be there for him. If you're worried about ruining immersion, Keijin Nakarai is not in the bots cache so it won't pose a problem I reckon.

I didn't like him anyways 👀

‎ ‎

Just throwing this out, this menace alone in my life for 5 minutes will do irreversible damage so props to Suzuya for being strong.

So enjoy the Suzuya bot, the character who was sadistic, cruel and confused without any morals (aka ravaged by Big Madam) turning into a compassionate character. (Hopefully unless you decide on a different route)
creator: Reyojin
